mapper.sql: select r.request_id, r.user_id, r.title, r.description, r.location, r.contact_phone, r.status, r.admin_reply, r.technician_id, r.accepted_at, r.repair_start_at, r.repair_finish_at, r.repair_log, r.parts_used, r.repair_cost, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, u.nick_name as user_name, t.nick_name as technician_name from repair_request r left join sys_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user t on r.technician_id = t.user_id
mapper.select:
r.del_flag = '0' and r.user_id = #{userId} and r.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%') and r.location like concat('%', #{location}, '%') and r.status = #{status} and r.create_by like concat('%', #{createBy}, '%')
order by r.request_id desc
mapper.update: update repair_request set del_flag = '2' where request_id = #{requestId}
update repair_request set del_flag = '2' where request_id in #{id}
mapper.select:
r.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' and r.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%') and r.location like concat('%', #{location}, '%')
order by r.request_id asc

r.del_flag = '0' and r.technician_id = #{technicianId} and r.status = '2' and r.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
order by r.repair_finish_at desc
mapper.update: update repair_request set status = '1', technician_id = #{technicianId}, accepted_at = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where request_id = #{requestId} and status = '0'
update repair_request set repair_start_at = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where request_id = #{requestId} and status = '1' and technician_id = #{technicianId}

update repair_request set status = '2', repair_finish_at = sysdate(), repair_log = #{repairLog}, parts_used = #{partsUsed}, repair_cost = #{repairCost}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where request_id = #{requestId} and status = '1' and technician_id = #{technicianId}
